summary: Comprehensive testing of Renergizr B2B Energy Trading Platform. All major features working. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Requires authentication (not public). Landing page ticker/hero fetches this endpoint - frontend must handle unauthenticated state. MOCKED - simulated data returned.
Returns {notifications: [], unread_count: 0} object (not array). Frontend should handle both formats correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Logout redirects to /auth page instead of landing page /. Requirement says 'redirects to landing'

issues: Carbon credits widget with market value not prominently visible in viewport - may require scrolling. Profile completion shows 0% with TEST_ company name (data side effect from backend tests).

action_items: Consider making /api/market/insights public OR ensure landing page handles 401 gracefully (ticker already works so likely using static/cached data for unauthenticated users)
Logout flow: redirect to landing page '/' instead of '/auth' after logout
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 700 lines - at the file size limit, consider splitting into routers (auth.py, rfq.py, vendor.py, admin.py)
/api/market/insights requires auth but landing page ticker shows prices to unauthenticated users - ticker likely uses static data, not this endpoint. Verify ticker data source.
VendorProfileUpdate model requires company_name as required field - could cause 422 for partial updates

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, minor logout redirect issue)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests updated vendor1@greensun.com company_name to 'TEST_Green Sun Energy'. Visible in Admin Vendors tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the major update are working: landing page ticker, hero live market widget, carbon CCTS section, news section, client dashboard with energy price chart + carbon widget, 4-step RFQ form, vendor dashboard with profile completion bar, vendor profile 3-tabs, admin dashboard with analytics charts. Test credentials: admin@renergizr.com/Admin@123, buyer1@acme.com/Client@123, vendor1@greensun.com/Vendor@123. Market insights API is MOCKED (simulated data). Notifications returns {notifications:[], unread_count:0} format.
